scripts.build:bun:linux: bun build server/index.ts --compile --target bun-linux-x64    --outfile binaries/fankarr-linux-x64 && bun build server/organize-worker.ts --target node --outfile binaries/organize-worker.js
scripts.build:bun:windows: bun build server/index.ts --compile --target bun-windows-x64  --outfile binaries/fankarr-windows-x64.exe && bun build server/organize-worker.ts --target node --outfile binaries/organize-worker.js
scripts.build:bun:macos: bun build server/index.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile binaries/fankarr-macos && bun build server/organize-worker.ts --target node --outfile binaries/organize-worker.js
scripts.build:bun:all: pnpm build:bun:linux && pnpm build:bun:windows && pnpm build:bun:macos
